Title: Successful Login Process
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the login page.
2. User enters valid username and password.
3. User clicks the login button.
4. System verifies the credentials against the database.
5. System logs the user in successfully.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the HOME page.

Title: Unsuccessful Login Process
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the login page.
2. User enters invalid username and password.
3. User clicks the login button.
4. System verifies the credentials against the database.
5. System fails to log the user in.
Expected Result: User remains on the login page with an error message displayed.

Title: Successful Registration Process
Test Data: Valid username: "new_user", valid password: "password123", valid email: "new_user@example.com".
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the registration page.
2. User fills out the registration form with valid details.
3. User clicks the register button.
4. System verifies the input data.
5. System creates a new user account in the database.
6. System logs the user in.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the HOME page.

Title: Unsuccessful Registration Process
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the registration page.
2. User fills out the registration form with invalid email.
3. User clicks the register button.
4. System verifies the input data.
5. System fails to create a new user account in the database.
Expected Result: User remains on the registration page with an error message displayed.

Title: Handling Proposals - View Proposals
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the HOME page.
2. User clicks on the "Proposte di scambio" option.
3. System displays the list of received proposals.
4. User selects a proposal.
5. System displays the details of the selected proposal.
Expected Result: User sees the list of received proposals and can view the details of a selected proposal.

Title: Handling Proposals - Accept Proposal
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the HOME page.
2. User clicks on the "Proposte di scambio" option.
3. System displays the list of received proposals.
4. User selects a proposal.
5. User clicks the "Accept" button.
6. System updates the proposal status to accepted.
Expected Result: Proposal status is updated to accepted and user sees a confirmation message.

Title: Viewing Personal Board
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the HOME page.
2. User clicks on the "Bachea personale" option.
3. System displays the personal board.
4. User clicks on the "Inserimento" option.
5. System allows user to add a new item.
6. User adds a new item.
7. System displays the list of items.
Expected Result: User sees the personal board with the added item listed.

Title: Deleting an Item from Personal Board
Preconditions: User is logged in and has items in the personal board.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the HOME page.
2. User clicks on the "Bachea personale" option.
3. System displays the personal board.
4. User selects an item to delete.
5. User confirms the deletion.
6. System removes the selected item from the board.
Expected Result: Selected item is removed from the personal board.

Title: Inserting a New Item
Test Data: Valid item name: "New Item", valid item description: "This is a new item".
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the HOME page.
2. User clicks on the "Insert new item" button.
3. System prompts user to provide item details.
4. User provides valid item details.
5. System inserts the new item into the database.
6. System shows the updated list of items.
Expected Result: New item is added to the list of items.

Title: Deleting an Existing Item
Preconditions: User is logged in and has items in the list.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the HOME page.
2. User clicks on the "Delete item" button.
3. System prompts user to confirm deletion.
4. User confirms the deletion.
5. System deletes the selected item from the database.
6. System shows the updated list of items.
Expected Result: Selected item is removed from the list of items.

Title: Proposing a New Exchange
Test Data: Valid exchange details: "Exchange Item A for Item B".
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the HOME page.
2. User clicks on the "Propose new exchange" option.
3. System prompts user to provide exchange details.
4. User provides valid exchange details.
5. System saves the exchange information in the database.
6. System shows the updated list of exchanges.
Expected Result: New exchange is added to the list of exchanges.

Title: Accepting or Rejecting an Exchange
Preconditions: User is logged in and has pending exchanges.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the HOME page.
2. User clicks on the "Exchanges" option.
3. System displays the list of pending exchanges.
4. User selects an exchange to accept or reject.
5. User clicks the "Accept" or "Reject" button.
6. System updates the exchange status in the database.
7. System shows the updated list of exchanges.
Expected Result: Selected exchange status is updated and user sees a confirmation message.

Title: Viewing Personal Information
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the HOME page.
2. User clicks on the "View personal info" option.
3. System retrieves the user's information from the database.
4. System displays the user's information.
Expected Result: User sees their personal information displayed.

Title: Updating Personal Information
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the HOME page.
2. User clicks on the "Edit personal info" option.
3. System retrieves the user's current information from the database.
4. User updates the email address.
5. User submits the updated information.
6. System saves the updated information in the database.
7. System shows the updated personal information.
Expected Result: User's email is updated and displayed correctly.

Title: Filtering Items
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the HOME page.
2. User clicks on the "Filter items" option.
3. System prompts user to enter filter criteria.
4. User enters valid filter criteria.
5. System applies the filter and retrieves filtered items from the database.
6. System displays the filtered list of items.
Expected Result: User sees the filtered list of items based on the entered criteria.

Title: Removing Filters
Preconditions: User is logged in and has applied filters.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the HOME page.
2. User clicks on the "Remove filters" option.
3. System clears all applied filters.
4. System retrieves and displays the full list of items.
Expected Result: All filters are removed and the full list of items is displayed.

Title: Retrieving Items from Database
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the HOME page.
2. User clicks on the "Get items" option.
3. System sends a request to the database to retrieve items.
4. Database responds with the requested items.
5. System displays the retrieved items to the user.
Expected Result: User sees the list of items retrieved from the database.

Title: Saving New Item in Database
Test Data: Valid item details: "New Item", "This is a new item".
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the HOME page.
2. User clicks on the "Insert new item" button.
3. System prompts user to provide item details.
4. User provides valid item details.
5. System sends a request to the database to save the new item.
6. Database responds with the item ID.
7. System shows the updated list of items.
Expected Result: New item is saved in the database and displayed in the list of items.

Title: Deleting Item from Database
Preconditions: User is logged in and has items in the list.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the HOME page.
2. User clicks on the "Delete item" button.
3. System prompts user to confirm deletion.
4. User confirms the deletion.
5. System sends a request to the database to delete the selected item.
6. Database responds with a success message.
7. System shows the updated list of items.
Expected Result: Selected item is deleted from the database and removed from the list of items.

Title: Accepting Privacy Document
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the registration/login page.
2. System prompts user to accept the privacy document.
3. User accepts the privacy document.
4. System inserts the user's acceptance into the database.
5. System proceeds with the registration/login process.
Expected Result: User's acceptance of the privacy document is recorded in the database and the registration/login process continues.

Title: Declining Privacy Document
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the registration/login page.
2. System prompts user to accept the privacy document.
3. User declines the privacy document.
4. System does not proceed with the registration/login process.
Expected Result: User is not allowed to proceed with registration/login until they accept the privacy document.

Title: Moving to Exchange Page
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the HOME page.
2. User clicks on the "Exchange" option.
3. System retrieves exchange information from the database.
4. System displays the list of exchanges.
Expected Result: User sees the list of exchanges displayed on the exchange page.
